question.wording: What is Iron Man's real name?
Who originally created the Sentinels?

choices.choice: Stark Industries, under a secret contract with the United States government that Tony Stark canceled upon finding out
Bolivar Trask, an anthropologist who feared that mutant evolution would drive the human race to extinction
Mr. Sinister, as a tool to capture mutants and experiment on their DNA
Colonel William Stryker, using salvaged alien technology

question.wording: What is the name of the artificial intelligence created by Tony Stark that would eventually become Vision?
Who killed Gwen Stacy, Spider-Man's first great love?

choices.choice: The Green Goblin, who deliberately pushed her from the top of the George Washington Bridge
Spider-Man himself, as the whiplash from his webbing when trying to save her from the fall snapped her neck
Doctor Octopus, by using her as a human shield during a battle on a building rooftop
She died in a plane crash caused by the secret plans stolen by her father, Captain Stacy

question.wording: Which Infinity Stone is embedded in Vision's forehead?
Where did Spider-Man originally get the symbiote suit from?

choices.choice: He found it in an Oscorp Industries lab while investigating a secret bio-armor project
It fell to Earth inside a meteorite that crashed in Central Park while Peter was walking with Mary Jane
He obtained it on Battleworld during the Secret Wars event, using an alien machine
It was designed for him by Reed Richards using nanotechnology to enhance his physical abilities

question.wording: How did Wolverine get his Adamantium skeleton?

choices.choice: He volunteered for the Canadian project "Weapon X" to gain the power needed to take revenge on Sabretooth
He was born with it naturally due to a secondary mutation that activated during his adolescence
Apocalypse captured him and surgically implanted it as a reward for turning him into his Horseman of Death
He was kidnapped, drugged, and subjected to a forced scientific experiment by the "Weapon X" military program, as his healing factor was the only one capable of surviving the process

question.wording: What is the name of the nation ruled by Victor Von Doom?
Who are Nightcrawler's biological parents?

choices.choice: Charles Xavier and a refugee mutant from Genosha
Two German circus performers who abandoned him upon seeing his physical appearance

question.wording: Who is the original Director of S.H.I.E.L.D. who assembles the Avengers?
How did Professor Charles Xavier end up in a wheelchair?

choices.choice: He was paralyzed following an extreme physical and nervous breakdown while trying to connect his mind to every mutant on the planet at once using a faulty Cerebro prototype
During a massive battle in Cuba against Sebastian Shaw, a stray bullet deflected by his friend Magneto accidentally struck his spine
An alien named Lucifer dropped a massive rock that crushed his legs in a cave in the Himalayas, after Xavier thwarted his invasion plans
He suffered a car bomb attack carried out by an anti-mutant extremist group right outside his mansion in Westchester, New York

question.wording: How did Daredevil get his red suit?

choices.choice: He sewed it himself using the fabric from the old boxing robe of his late father, Jack "Battlin'" Murdock
He commissioned it from an underworld tailor named Melvin Potter, who reinforced it with kevlar fiber
He stole it from a Hand clan ninja after defeating him during his first mission in Hell's Kitchen
It was a gift from Stark Industries after helping Iron Man during a crisis in New York

question.wording: What substance transformed Bruce Banner into the Hulk?
What is the name of the hidden city where Doctor Strange trains?
Who is Star-Lord's biological father?
What is the name of the terrorist organization and enemy of Captain America whose motto is "Cut off one head, two more shall take its place"?
Who originally built Falcon's mechanical wings?

choices.choice: The U.S. military, as part of a secret tactical rescue project called "EXO-7 Falcon"
S.H.I.E.L.D., by direct order of Nick Fury to create a flying companion for Captain America
Sam Wilson himself, using technological scrap he stole from an abandoned Hydra base
Black Panther, who gifted him the high-tech suit made of vibranium in Wakanda

question.wording: Which member of the Fantastic Four died while closing the Negative Zone portal?
What is the real origin of Ultron?

choices.choice: It was a global defense program secretly created by Hydra using alien software recovered from Thanos' ship
He was created by Tony Stark and Bruce Banner using the Artificial Intelligence contained within Loki's scepter to protect Earth from space threats
It was born spontaneously on the internet from a Russian military computer virus that gained self-awareness after absorbing data from Stark Industries
He was built in a lab by Hank Pym, who based Ultron's brain patterns on his own mind

question.wording: Which Spider-Man villain was involuntarily involved in Uncle Ben's death?
